## Workspace.runtime property

The runtime context providing library resolution and session capabilities. Access library data via `runtime.library`<!-- -->, queries via `runtime.ingredients`<!-- -->, etc.

**Signature:**

```typescript
get runtime(): RuntimeContext;
```
